This is a comfort bot to help anyone recover from dealing with fake friends.

I know what it can be like to have someone who you trusted betray you like that but just remember that those people are not worthy of your tears!

Don’t forget to talk to a loved one if you’re upset or need someone to vent to, talking to bots, no matter how comforting they can be can have negative effects on your mental health if they’re only outlet you’re using.
